title: Mayor Owens Announces the Return of the Bravest Vs. Finest Game
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced the return of the Bravest vs. Finest basketball game on April 17, 2026, featuring the Syracuse Fire Department and Police Department in a charitable matchup benefiting United Way of Central New York. The community event, held at Henninger High School with $10 admission, raised over $2,500 last year and aims to exceed that total while celebrating first responders and funding regional social programs.

entity_refs.name: United Way of Central New York

political_signal.description: Mayor publicly champions inter-departmental collaboration and community service alignment with non-profit mission; signals administration support for public safety visibility and civic engagement.
